**Forklift Operator - Atlanta, GA - $22-26/hr**

Join our team at a 240,000 sq ft cross-dock facility in Atlanta, GA. We are a leading logistics company focused on delivering efficient and reliable service to our clients. We pride ourselves on our hardworking team and commitment to safety and quality.

**Requirements:**
- 3+ years of experience operating forklifts in a warehouse environment
- Valid OSHA Class I, IV, and V certification
- Proficient in operating both reach trucks and counterbalance forklifts
- Experience with Warehouse Management Systems (WMS)
- Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and meet tight deadlines

**Nice to Have:**
- Experience with inventory management
- Previous experience in a cross-dock facility
- Familiarity with safety protocols and procedures

**Schedule Details:**
- 10-hour shifts, with overtime opportunities
- Must be available for flexible scheduling, including weekends if needed

If you’re a skilled forklift operator looking to join a dedicated team, apply today!
